The '''Battle of Vactooine''' was an engagement between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and [[12-4C-41's Droid Army]] that took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vactooine]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. After the Alliance ceased receiving shipments of metal from the planet, the Rebels [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[Q-7N]] investigated and discovered that [[Olag Greck]] had influenced [[Droid/Legends|droids]] to seize control of the outpost. The Rebels managed to convince the droids to turn against Greck, foiling the plot.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 11: Bounty Hunters vs. Battle Droids]]'' {{1st}}
